decisions.decision: api.ts: allow BASE='' in dev (Vite proxy handles it), throw in PROD only
decisions.rationale: Module-level throw crashed React before mount in dev; empty BASE in production would leak JWTs to wrong origin

decisions.decision: vercel.json: deploy frontend (Vite/React) not backend (FastAPI goes to Railway)
decisions.rationale: Previous config pointed to non-existent index.py Python handler

decisions.decision: Chat test approach: mock @/lib/api and global EventSource, test full SSE flow via component integration
decisions.rationale: Gives coverage of the real useSSEStream hook without needing a live backend

next_action: Update STATE.md to post-milestone state, then plan Phase 2 items (Telegram bot, PMC chart, dark mode) or handle remaining human actions (iOS retest, GCal OAuth verification)
context_notes: Milestone v1.0 is fully shipped. All 5 phases complete, 79 tests passing, deployed on Vercel + Railway (pending). The session was maintenance: code review fixes, deployment config correction, blank-page bug fix, security hardening, README, and chat test coverage.
